category_sources: official dhall-haskell repository contains the dhall-json package directory: https://github.com/dhall-lang/dhall-haskell/tree/main/dhall-json
source_facts.description: Dhall to JSON compiler and a Dhall to YAML compiler
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage: https://github.com/dhall-lang/dhall-haskell/tree/master/dhall-json redirects to the official main branch package path
docs_sources: official Dhall docs include a tutorial for generating JSON or YAML: https://docs.dhall-lang.org/tutorials/Getting-started_Generate-JSON-or-YAML.html
official package subdirectory is the best package-specific documentation surface: https://github.com/dhall-lang/dhall-haskell/tree/main/dhall-json
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the dhall-json subdirectory in the official dhall-lang/dhall-haskell repository
tags_sources: official Dhall docs at https://docs.dhall-lang.org/ include JSON/YAML generation documentation
source_facts.executables includes dhall-to-json, dhall-to-yaml, and json-to-dhall
